zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Isabella Lamont於1318年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾拉莫特時，她的父親John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont29歲，母親Joan Campbell24歲。她於1342年5月2日與Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾 安德 布特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1364年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年46歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾洛霍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Isabella Lamont于1318年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾拉莫特时，她的父亲John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont29岁，母亲Joan Campbell24岁。她于1342年5月2日与Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow在英国苏格兰阿吉爾 安德 布特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1364年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年46岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾洛霍。

nameMeanings.name: Lamont
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: from the medieval personal name Lagman, which is from Old Norse Lǫgmathr, composed of the elements lǫg, plural of lag ‘law’ (from leggja ‘to lay down’), + mathr ‘man’ (genitive manns).
French: habitational name, with fused definite article l', from any of the places called Amont, in Haute-Saône and Haute-Vienne.
Altered form of French   Lamothe  .

variants.name: McClammy
meanings: Scottish: patronymic from a pet form of   Lamont  .

variants.name: McClymont
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Laomuinn ‘son of Laomann’, a personal name borrowed from Old Norse and meaning ‘law giver’. See Lamont .

variants.name: Lemond
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .
French: variant of Lemonde, a nickname from Old French monde ‘pure’, with fused masculine definite article le.
French (Lémond): variant of Laymond, itself a variant, with fused definite article l', of Aymond .

variants.name: Lemont
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .
French: habitational name from Le Mont in the Vosges or possibly other minor places so named from Old French mont ‘mountain’. Alternatively, a variant of Lemond 2.

variants.name: Lemonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Lamont , with English excrescent -s.

variants.name: Lawman
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   Lamont  .

English: occupational name from Middle English lagman, lagheman ‘law-man, one whose duty is to declare the law; lawyer’ (Old Norse lagmann-, lǫgmann-, oblique case of lǫgmathr). The word was also widely used as a personal name, Middle English Lagman, Lagheman.

variants.name: Lamond
meanings: Scottish, northern Irish, and French: variant of   Lamont  . This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Lamothe
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Marcel, Andre, Jacques, Pierre, Donat, Francois, Lucien, Odette, Adrien, Andree, Armand, Armande.
French: variant of   Lamotte  , or a habitational name from any of the places in France named Lamothe or La Mothe.

History: The settlement that became the city of Detroit was founded in 1701 by Antoine de la Mothe, Sieur de Cadillac (1658–1730), governor of LA. He was born into the minor nobility in Gascony, France, where his father owned the seigneury of Cadillac.

variants.name: Lamonte
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Lamont  .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Isabella Lamont was born in 1318, in Lamont, Argyll, Scotland, her father, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, was 29 and her mother, Joan Campbell, was 24. She married Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow on 2 May 1342, in Argyll and Bute, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1364, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 46, and was buried in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Isabella Lamont est née en 1318, à Lamont, Argyll, Écosse, son père, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Joan Campbell, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow le 2 mai 1342, à Argyll and Bute, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1364, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Lochawe, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Isabella Lamont 1318 in Lamont, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont 29 und ihre Mutter Joan Campbell 24. Sie hat am 2. Mai 1342 in Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1364 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Isabella Lamont è nata il nel 1318 nel Lamont, Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Joan Campbell, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow il 2 maggio 1342, nel Argyll and Bute, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1364, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Isabella Lamontが1318年にスコットランドアルグイルラモントで生まれた時，父John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamontは29歳，母Joan Campbellは24歳であった。1342年5月2日にイギリススコットランドアルグイル アンド ブトでSir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1364年にスコットランドアルグイルで46歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルロチャウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Isabella Lamont(이)가 1318년 스컷랜드 아그이 램트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Campbell(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1342년 5월 2일 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 앤드 부트에서 Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1364년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 럭아베에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Isabella Lamont nasceu em 1318, em Lamont, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Joan Campbell, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow em 2 de maio de 1342, em Argyll and Bute, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1364, em Argyll, Scotland, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.

ro.Lamont, Argyll, Scotland: Argyll and Bute, Scoția, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Isabella Lamont родилась в 1318 г. в местности лэмонт, аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Campbell, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow 2 мая 1342 г. в местности аргилл анд бут, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1364 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности лочав, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Isabella Lamont nació en 1318, en Lamont, Argyll, Scotland, su papá, John Mor Lamont 3rd Chief of Clan Lamont, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Joan Campbell, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Sir Archibald Mor Campbell 12th. Laird of Lochow el 2 de mayo de 1342, en Argyll and Bute, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1364, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Lochawe, Argyll, Scotland.
